# CI workflow diagrams

Visual DAG diagrams for PostHog's most complex CI workflows.
Generated by `bin/generate-ci-diagrams.py`.

Rendered version: [CI workflow diagrams on the handbook](https://posthog.com/handbook/engineering/ci-workflows)

| Workflow                                  | File                    | Jobs | Triggers                                           |
| ----------------------------------------- | ----------------------- | ---- | -------------------------------------------------- |
| [Backend CI](ci-backend.md)               | `ci-backend.yml`        | 14   | merge_group, pull_request, push, workflow_dispatch |
| [Dagster CI](ci-dagster.md)               | `ci-dagster.yml`        | 3    | pull_request, push                                 |
| [E2E CI Playwright](ci-e2e-playwright.md) | `ci-e2e-playwright.yml` | 5    | pull_request, push, workflow_dispatch              |
| [Frontend CI](ci-frontend.md)             | `ci-frontend.yml`       | 7    | merge_group, pull_request, push                    |
| [MCP CI](ci-mcp.md)                       | `ci-mcp.yml`            | 6    | pull_request, push                                 |
| [Node.js CI](ci-nodejs.md)                | `ci-nodejs.yml`         | 5    | merge_group, pull_request, push                    |
| [Proto CI](ci-proto.md)                   | `ci-proto.yml`          | 5    | merge_group, pull_request, push, workflow_dispatch |
| [Rust CI](ci-rust.md)                     | `ci-rust.yml`           | 5    | merge_group, pull_request, push, workflow_dispatch |
| [Security](ci-security.md)                | `ci-security.yaml`      | 8    | merge_group, pull_request, push                    |
| [Storybook](ci-storybook.md)              | `ci-storybook.yml`      | 9    | merge_group, pull_request, push                    |

## Regenerating

```bash
python bin/generate-ci-diagrams.py
```

To regenerate a single workflow:

```bash
python bin/generate-ci-diagrams.py ci-backend.yml
```
